articles.title_en: Ukrainian forces attacked Russia’s Belgorod Region 55 times over past day
articles.lead_en: As a result of the attacks, three people were killed and another three were injured, acting regional governor Alexander Shuvalev said
articles.title_raw: Ukrainian forces attacked Russia’s Belgorod Region 55 times over past day
articles.lead_raw: As a result of the attacks, three people were killed and another three were injured, acting regional governor Alexander Shuvalev said

articles.title_en: Ukrainian drones kill two in Russia. Lukoil refinery catches fire.
articles.lead_en: A Ukrainian drone strike on a synthetic fiber plant in the city of Volzhsky in the Volgograd region killed one person, regional Governor Andrei Bocharov said. The victim was a 60-year-old man.
articles.title_raw: Ukrainian drones kill two in Russia. Lukoil refinery catches fire.
articles.lead_raw: A Ukrainian drone strike on a synthetic fiber plant in the city of Volzhsky in the Volgograd region killed one person, regional Governor Andrei Bocharov said. The victim was a 60-year-old man.
